creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193423
py-pytest-django-3.2.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates devel/py-pytest-django to 3.2.1 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest-django/compare/2.9.1...3.2.1

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS and BUILD_DEPENDS to match the dependencies
- added LICENSE + LICENSE_FILE
- added NO_ARCH
- removed patch in files/patch-setup.py because it is no longer needed


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
